loop1.title: Battery Health
loop1.note: This electrical meter does not measure battery SOC, temperature, or UPS output voltage/current; the card renders with no data.

loop1.title: Battery Health History
loop1.note: Showing battery health history skeleton — SOC, DC Bus, and Thermal scores are battery-domain quantities not measured by this electrical meter; the card renders its structural frame with honest blanks for the score series.

loop1.title: Backup Readiness
loop1.note: Showing backup readiness score and load-based proxies — battery-specific metrics (runtime, headroom, envelope) are not measured by this UPS meter.

loop1.title: Backup Readiness History
loop1.note: Showing historical trend of autonomy index and contributing scores (backup time, load pressure, headroom) — these are battery-autonomy domain indices not directly derivable from this meter's electrical columns; proxying from active_power_total_kw.

loop2: 'ups-asset-dashboard/battery-autonomy' answers the prompt as routed; these cards cover quantities not recorded for this asset and render honest-blank per-leaf with the reason: Battery Health (This electrical meter does not measure battery SOC, temperature, or UPS output voltage/current; the card renders with no data.).
